Attributes.Description: Name of the winery producing the wine.
Specific name or label of the wine, alongside vintage as necessary.
Geographical area where the wine is produced.
Specific vineyard within a region where the wine's grapes are sourced.
Suggested retail price of the wine.
Evaluation score given to the wine.
Suggested period when wine should be consumed for optimal experience.
Name of the grape variety used to produce the wine.
Specific terroir or recognized quality region.
Specific officially recognized area for wine production within the broader region.
General or broad name of the wine-producing area.
The primary county or state where the wine-producing area is located.
Whether the region is recognized as an American Viticultural Area (AVA).
Details about soil, climate, and topography defining the region's characteristics for viticulture.
